items.name: D.E.G Vulture Cloak (1/4)
items.description:
DRC-X5 Vulture set was worn by a D.E.G Captain in South Africa during field testing. 

It performed very well with its mobility and speed due to bionic tech incorporated into the small exoskeleton underneath. Resulting in the user surviving in a plague infested Czech. 

Sadly, this public set lacks said bionic tech or exoskeleton. But nonetheless, a stylistic choice. 
(Original Lore/Set requested from: Ceeley)
(Concept from: Amelie Anime)

items.name: Maiko's kimono -Halloween- No.2
items.description:
The "Kimono" is one of Japan's traditional costumes.
There are many different types of kimono and this item was designed with a Halloween pattern based on the motif of a "Susohiki"!

Maiko usually wear shoes called "oboko" and walk slowly.
Let's all walk slowly like maiko!

In order to improve the quality, this kimono was made as a top and bottom set!
The top is available in our store, so please have a look there too!

Japan, Japanese, Kimono, Kyoto, Nara, Maiko,
